content: Echo v5 handler patterns: HandlerFunc signature is func(c *echo.Context) error. Handler receives *echo.Context (pointer, not value). JSON response via c.JSON(code, i). Bind JSON body via c.Bind(&target) or echo.BindBody(c, &target). Structured errors via echo.HTTPError or custom error types. Context stores/retrieves via c.Set(key, val) / c.Get(key). Path params via echo.PathParam[T](c, name). Query params via echo.QueryParam[T](c, name). Middleware signature: echo.MiddlewareFunc = func(next echo.HandlerFunc) echo.HandlerFunc. Error handler: echo.HTTPErrorHandler func(c *Context, err error).
